scripts.build: npm run build -w @tinysa/contracts && npm run build -w @tinysa/instrument-runtime && npm run build -w @tinysa/signal-lab-driver && npm run build -w @tinysa/analysis && npm run build -w @tinysa/agent && npm run build -w @tinysa/device && npm run build -w @tinysa/test-device && npm run build -w @tinysa/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:signal-lab-bridge && npm run dev -w @tinysa/desktop
scripts.check:launcher: node --check tools/dev-launcher/main.cjs && node --check tools/dev-launcher/install.mjs && node --test tools/dev-launcher/bounded-log.test.cjs tools/dev-launcher/install-layout.test.mjs
scripts.check:observable-training-worker: tsup tools/observable-training-sampling-worker.ts tools/observable-training-sampling-worker-check.ts --format esm --out-dir .artifacts/observable-training-worker-test --platform node --no-splitting --treeshake --silent --clean && node .artifacts/observable-training-worker-test/observable-training-sampling-worker-check.js && npm run check:observable-training-launcher
scripts.check:signal-classifier: tsup tools/validate-signal-lab-classifier.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/validate-signal-lab-classifier.js
scripts.check:bayesian-detector: tsup tools/validate-bayesian-detector.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/validate-bayesian-detector.js
scripts.release:trio: npm --prefix ../TinySA_SignalLab run check && npm run check:trio-contract && npm run check && npm run check:bayesian-detector && npm run check:signal-classifier-model && npm run check:signal-classifier && npm run check:signal-classifier-publication && npm run check:firmware-twin
scripts.check: npm run prepare:signal-lab-bridge && npm run check:launcher && npm run check:packaged-resources && npm run check:observable-training-worker && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run check:package-boundaries && npm test
